scripts.render:mp4: remotion render src/index.ts ProductTour ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 24 && ffmpeg -y -i ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.mp4 -an -c:v libx264 -preset slow -crf 26 -movflags +faststart ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour.mp4 && rm ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.mp4
scripts.render:webm: remotion render src/index.ts ProductTour ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.webm --codec vp8 --crf 24 && ffmpeg -y -i ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.webm -an -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf 34 -b:v 0 -row-mt 1 ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour.webm && rm ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-master.webm
scripts.render:poster: remotion still src/index.ts ProductTourPoster ../web/public/media/insightform-product-tour-poster.png --image-format png && node scripts/convert-poster.mjs
scripts.render: pnpm run render:poster && pnpm run render:mp4 && pnpm run render:webm
scripts.test: echo "Marketing video verified by render scripts"
